subtitle:
[00:00] | HOOK — The sea exposes every hidden weakness. | (6) | [hook]

[00:02] | LINE 1 — A worker on deck swings a heavy sledgehammer to release a massive anchor chain. | (14) | [observe]
[00:05] | LINE 2 — A single point of failure can decide the fate of a vessel in an instant. | (15) | [lesson]

[00:05] | LINE 1 — Freezing ocean water splashes directly into an open cargo door on a moving ship. | (14) | [observe]
[00:12] | LINE 2 — Even the smallest unchecked vulnerability invites the freezing cold deep of the ocean inside. | (16) | [lesson]

[00:19] | LINE 1 — Dozens of massive metal cargo containers break loose and collapse off a listing ship. | (14) | [observe]
[00:21] | LINE 2 — What took months to secure can be destroyed in seconds by an indifferent sea. | (15) | [lesson]

[00:23] | LINE 1 — A violent and powerful whirlpool spins rapidly right next to a ship's metal deck. | (14) | [observe]
[00:26] | LINE 2 — Danger does not always scream; sometimes it pulls quietly from beneath the surface. | (13) | [lesson]

[00:30] | LINE 1 — A massive vessel bow slices through calm water before crashing into violent waves. | (14) | [observe]
[00:43] | LINE 2 — To survive any storm, you must learn to take the blow and keep rising. | (14) | [lesson]

[00:56] | CLOSING — Respect is the only currency the sea accepts. | (8) | [closing]
[00:59] | CTA — Has the ocean ever humbled you? Share your story below. | (10) | [cta]
voiceover: HOOK — The sea exposes every hidden weakness.LINE 1 — A worker on deck swings a heavy sledgehammer to release a massive anchor chain.LINE 2 — A single point of failure can decide the fate of a vessel in an instant.LINE 1 — Freezing ocean water splashes directly into an open cargo door on a moving ship.LINE 2 — Even the smallest unchecked vulnerability invites the freezing cold deep of the ocean inside.LINE 1 — Dozens of massive metal cargo containers break loose and collapse off a listing ship.LINE 2 — What took months to secure can be destroyed in seconds by an indifferent sea.LINE 1 — A violent and powerful whirlpool spins rapidly right next to a ship's metal deck.LINE 2 — Danger does not always scream; sometimes it pulls quietly from beneath the surface.LINE 1 — A massive vessel bow slices through calm water before crashing into violent waves.LINE 2 — To survive any storm, you must learn to take the blow and keep rising.CLOSING — Respect is the only currency the sea accepts.CTA — Has the ocean ever humbled you? Share your story below.
